title: Connected Copper Grates
description: A resource pack that connects copper grates of the same type. Requires a connected textures mod.
body:
- Connected textures for copper grates
- New, lighter texture because the default texture only tiles in one direction
- Waxed and unwaxed grates intentionally don't connect to allow for more texture variety and make it easily visible if you missed waxing a block
- The version labeled "Visibly Waxed" adds a golden/wax-colored border on waxed copper grates (inventory only) for VanillaTweaks "Visual Waxed Copper (Items)" parity



**Requires a connected blocks mod (OptiFine/Continuity/Fusion/...) to function**



If you experience any issues or have any ideas or feedback you want to share with me, feel free to message me on Discord: l3v0id
